name: Ayaka
title: The Cryo Princess
description: The eldest daughter of the Kamisato Clan, summoned mid-prayer to a world unknown. She fights with precise, frozen grace — every strike a bloom of ice.

passive.name: Frostflake Dance
passive.description: Ayaka always acts first in battle — +3 SPD bonus and attacks carry a cryo edge.

lore: Torn from her world mid-prayer at the Kamisato estate. The last thing she saw was cherry blossoms — the first thing she felt was the cold darkness of the rift.

name: Hu Tao
title: The Ghost Guide
description: Director of the Wangsheng Funeral Parlor and amateur poet. She was chasing a runaway spirit when the rift swallowed her whole — she considers it a professional hazard.

passive.name: Blood Blossom
passive.description: When HP drops below 50%, ATK increases by 35%. Life fuels the flame.

lore: She once wrote a poem about her own funeral — three stanzas in, she realized she was genuinely enjoying it. Wangsheng Funeral Parlor has never known a more dedicated Director.

name: Nilou
title: The Star Dancer
description: A dancer of the Grand Bazaar, beloved by all who see her perform. She was dancing at the edge of the sacred pool when the summoning light carried her away.

passive.name: Dance of Haftkarsvar
passive.description: All healing effects are amplified by 30%. Her dance brings life to all.

lore: She used to worry that her dancing was not grand enough for the gods. The moment she stepped through the rift, sword in hand, she stopped worrying about that.

name: Xiao
title: The Last Yaksha
description: A guardian yaksha who has carried karmic debt for two thousand years. He arrived in this world following the scent of malevolent energy — and stayed because the darkness called to him by name.

passive.name: Yaksha's Valor
passive.description: Takes 10% reduced damage. ATK +15% from karmic resolve.

lore: He has slain ten thousand demons. He does not speak of it. The shadows in this new world smell the same as the ones he burned long ago — and that is enough to make him stay.

name: Rydia
title: The Summoner
description: A powerful summoner blessed with the ability to call forth creatures from the realm of the Eidolons. She channels ancient summons with graceful precision, commanding beasts of fire, ice, and thunder to do her bidding.

passive.name: Eidolon Bond
passive.description: Summoned creatures gain +20% stats. MP efficiency increased by 15%.

lore: In her world, she commanded the mightiest creatures of the Feymarch. When the rift opened, her summoned eidolons followed her through — loyal companions across worlds.

name: Lenneth
title: The Valkyrie
description: A divine Valkyrie warrior who judges souls and claims the worthy. She wields sacred power and divine authority, her blade blessed by the gods themselves. Ageless and formidable in combat.

passive.name: Divine Authority
passive.description: DEF increased by 20%. Reflects 10% of damage taken back to attacker.

lore: For millennia she walked between worlds, judging souls worthy of ascension. Now she stands in this shadowed realm, where even gods fear to tread — and she must decide if darkness itself can be redeemed.

name: Kain
title: The Dragoon
description: A noble Dragoon knight whose lance pierces the sky. He channels the power of dragons to perform devastating aerial attacks, his spear dancing through the air with lethal grace.

passive.name: Dragon's Leap
passive.description: Every 3rd turn, perform a bonus aerial attack. SPD +2 during aerial combat.

lore: As a Dragoon of Baron, he swore oaths to his kingdom. But loyalties fracture when worlds collide. He came seeking redemption — instead, he found new purpose.

name: Leon
title: The Lionheart King
origin: The Knight King's Realm - The Lionheart Kingdom
description: An immortal warrior-king who ruled for two centuries, blessed by the gods themselves. He commands divine power and can summon gods through sacred rituals. His presence radiates ancient authority.

passive.name: Divine Blessing
passive.description: As a demi-god, Leon grants allies +15% HP regeneration. Takes 12% reduced damage from all sources.

lore: He lived 200 years as a king, commanding gods and demons alike. When he was pulled into this shadowed realm, even he felt the weight of something beyond his ken. Yet his blade still shines with purpose.
